name: multipass
description: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable ship. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

interface.longDescription: Give your AI a persistent memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable ship backed by ChromaDB, with 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided skills.
defaultPrompt: Search my memories for recent decisions
Mine this project into my memory ship
Show my ship status and room counts
